summary: Gangdong's narrow DPK win (진선미 50.12 vs 전주혜 47.88) is stable but small-margin. Residential east-Seoul base without strong ideological gradients — outcomes track national mood and incumbent familiarity.

issues.label: National mood
issues.description: Narrow margin suggests responsiveness to national wave; DPK held with the 2024 anti-Yoon tide.

issues.label: Incumbent advantage
issues.description: 진선미 has held the seat across multiple cycles, building personal brand.

issues.label: Mixed residential base
issues.description: No dominant demographic driver; middle-income residential mix.
